summary: Chat completion features are well-implemented with proper validation and OpenAI compatibility.

observations.description: ChatCompletionRequest model includes all OpenAI-compatible fields: temperature, max_tokens, top_p, stop, presence_penalty, frequency_penalty
Pydantic validators ensure proper field constraints (e.g., temperature 0.0-2.0, max_tokens >= 1)
System message support implemented correctly in chat endpoint
Comprehensive tests for all chat features including validation, boundaries, and error cases

codeQuality.notes: Proper use of Pydantic for validation, clean separation of concerns

testCoverage.notes: Tests cover all feature combinations and edge cases
